name: Debt Instrument Exception to Constructive Sales

eligibility.description: Applies to debt positions that unconditionally entitle the holder to a specified principal amount and are not convertible into stock.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Certain non-convertible debt positions are excluded from the definition of 'appreciated financial positions,' allowing taxpayers to hedge these positions without triggering immediate gain recognition.
